data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Spotify minimizes the number of choices to streamline user decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Simplified menus and streamlined navigation to enhance usability.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Design ensures that frequently used controls are easily accessible and targetable.
data.technical_spec: Optimized button and control sizes for touch interfaces.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: The visually appealing design enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design language and high-quality visual assets.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focuses on optimizing primary user paths and common features.
data.technical_spec: Feature analysis to identify and enhance key user interactions.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Places important controls and content at the beginning and end of user journeys.
data.technical_spec: Prioritization of content based on usage patterns.
